data.body:
## Description
Add new test assertions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh that will fail (RED) against the current SKILL.md. These assertions validate recommendation synthesis, Socratic dialogue, test isolation enforcement, and check-onboarding.sh compatibility.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh

## New Test Assertions to Add
1. test_recommendation_synthesis: SKILL.md must instruct synthesizing findings into recommendations — grep for 'recommend' AND 'synthesiz'
2. test_project_file_citations: SKILL.md must instruct citing specific project files in recommendations — grep for 'cit.*project.*file' or 'specific.*file.*pattern'
3. test_per_recommendation_interaction: SKILL.md must allow user to accept/reject/discuss each recommendation — grep for 'accept.*reject' or 'discuss.*recommendation'
4. test_test_isolation_enforcement: SKILL.md must include test isolation enforcement in recommendations — grep for 'test.*isolation'
5. test_socratic_dialogue_pattern: SKILL.md must contain Socratic dialogue indicators (open-ended, follow-up) — grep for 'Socratic' or 'open-ended' or 'follow-up'
6. test_no_rigid_multiple_choice: SKILL.md must NOT have rigid (a)/(b)/(c) menu patterns — negative assertion
7. test_check_onboarding_compatibility: SKILL.md must produce artifacts detectable by check-onboarding.sh — grep for 'ARCH_ENFORCEMENT' or 'check-onboarding'

## TDD Requirement
All new tests must FAIL when run against current SKILL.md (RED state).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] At least 5 new test functions added
  Verify: grep -c 'test_recommendation_synthesis\|test_project_file_citations\|test_per_recommendation\|test_test_isolation\|test_no_rigid_multiple_choice\|test_check_onboarding' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New assertions fail against current SKILL.md (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
